---
title: "Fig 3n + ED Fig 5b - PA-Rac1 / Arp3 KO precursor (Pre/Act/Post)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  variant: "KO"
  pdf_name: "KO_length.eps"
  length_y_limit: !r c(-30, 30)
---

<!--
================================================================================
  STAGE-1 PRECURSOR wrapper for Fig 3n + ED Fig 5b, Arp3 KO condition.
================================================================================
  Variant-specific data loading happens HERE; the deterministic
  pivot / save / plot pipeline is delegated to:
      ../../templates/fig03n_parac1_precursor.Rmd

  Body N = 45 ROIs (length), 48 ROIs (actin intensity).
  Published N = 40 events (2 outliers removed in the consolidator).

  Pipeline -> downstream consolidator
      figures/Fig03_Arp3/fig03n_parac1_gc_soma_length.Rmd
  which reads:
      KO_actin_int.rds  (produced here)
      KO_length.rds     (produced here)
  alongside the C450M / T17N siblings' .rds and the WT data, then runs
  Kruskal-Wallis + Dunn across all PA-Rac1 conditions.

  Essentiality: Essential. Pairs with the 2 sibling precursors.

  Original 247-line monolithic wrapper refactored 2026-05-12: variant-
  specific CSV-loading + actin-table concatenation kept inline; the
  generic pivot/save/plot pipeline moved to the canonical template.
  Original G:\ source: G:/Figure 3_Arp3/Fig. 3j-n_PARac1/Andor/Arp3KO/Neurite activity corr.Rmd
-->

## Step 1: libraries + load saved environment

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(ggpubr)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(viridis)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData", sep = "/")
load(file = saved_path)
```

## Step 2: Build `length_input` from per-cell *_length*.csv files

```{r message=FALSE}
folder_path <- Path_1
file_paths  <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "_length(.*)csv$",
                          recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
folder_name <- basename(dirname(file_paths))

data_list <- file_paths %>% map(read.csv)
for (n in 1:length(data_list)) {
  data_list[[n]]$Exp <- folder_name[n]
}

length_input <- data_list %>% reduce(bind_rows)
```

## Step 3: Build `actin_input` by concatenating actin_quant + actin_quant_2 (N=48)

```{r}
actin_quant$Series <- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")
actin_quant$roi    <- rep(1:27, each = 3)

actin_quant_2 <- actin_quant_2[, 1:5]
actin_quant_2$Series <- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")
actin_quant_2$roi    <- rep(1:21, each = 3)

actin_quant <- rbind(actin_quant, actin_quant_2)
actin_quant$roi   <- rep(1:48, each = 3)
actin_quant$Image <- actin_quant$Label %>% str_remove("\\.tif:.*")
actin_quant$Site  <- "NA"
actin_quant$exp   <- "KO_PA_Rac1_WT"

actin_input <- actin_quant
```

## Step 4: include canonical pivot/save/plot template

```{r child = "../../templates/fig03n_parac1_precursor.Rmd"}
```

## Step 5: persist working environment

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData", sep = "/")
save.image(file = saved_path)
```
